errors.bydcloud_not_configured_setup_required: BYD Cloud not configured. Set up credentials first.
errors.bydcloud_password_required_first_setup: Password is required for first setup
errors.bydcloud_pin_required_first_setup: Control PIN is required for first setup
errors.bydcloud_bangcle_tables_missing_reinstal: Bangcle crypto tables not found. Reinstall the app.
errors.bydcloud_login_no_vehicles_with_detail: Login succeeded but no vehicles found: {0}
errors.bydcloud_login_pin_verify_failed_with_de: Login succeeded but control PIN verification failed: {0}
errors.external_storage_cleanup_disabled: External storage cleanup is disabled in config
errors.performance_no_data: Performance monitoring not started or no data collected yet
errors.reset_trip_in_progress: Trip in progress — turn ACC off first
errors.reset_recording_in_progress: Recording in progress — stop recording first
errors.reset_surveillance_in_progress: Surveillance recording in progress — wait for it to stop
errors.surveillance_no_frame_available: No frame available — start surveillance or record an event first
errors.update_disabled_in_public_mode: Updates are disabled in PUBLIC sharing mode. Switch to PRIVATE mode in the in-car app first.
errors.update_already_in_progress: An update is already in progress
errors.update_channel_write_failed: Could not save the update channel
errors.update_channel_tag_mismatch: That version is on a different channel. Switch channels first.
errors.logs_upload_unavailable: Log upload is not available in this build
errors.vehicle_trunk_unlock_failed: Cannot open trunk: unlock failed. Car may still be locked.

error_details.app_context_not_ready: The app is not ready yet.
error_details.public_mode: Updates are disabled in public mode.
error_details.channel_save_failed: The update channel could not be saved.
error_details.update_in_progress: An update is already in progress.
error_details.inactive_channel: This version is not available on the active channel.
error_details.unavailable_build: This feature is not available in this build.
error_details.permission_denied: The device denied permission for this operation.
error_details.storage_full: The device does not have enough free storage.

router.unknown_command: Unknown command. Use /help for available commands.

url.none_running:
⚠️ No tunnel running

Start one with:
`/daemon cloudflared start`
`/daemon zrok start`
`/daemon tailscale start`
url.title: 🌐 *Tunnel URLs*
url.retry_pending: _Try again in a few seconds for pending URLs._

help.text:
📖 *Commands*
_OverDrive {0}_

*Surveillance*
`/start` - Start surveillance
`/stop` - Stop surveillance
`/status` - System status

*Events*
`/events [hours] [page]` - List recordings
`/download <file>` - Download video

*Daemons*
`/daemons` - List all daemons
`/daemon <name> start|stop`

*System*
`/url` - Tunnel URL
`/update` - Check for app update
`/backup` - Export settings backup
`/backup trips` - Backup incl. trip history
`/help` - This message

daemon.cannot_control_telegram: ⚠️ The Telegram daemon cannot be controlled through Telegram.
daemon.must_start_from_app: ⚠️ {0} must be started from the app interface.

events.none_recent: 📭 No events in the last {0} hours
events.recording_in_progress:
⏳ *Recording in progress*

File: `{0}`
Current size: {1}

Wait 10–15 seconds and try again.
events.file_too_large:
❌ *File too large*

File: `{0}`
Size: {1}
Limit: 50 MB
events.upload_failed: ❌ Failed to upload the video. Try again later.

update.service_unreachable:
⚠️ Could not reach the update service.

The camera daemon may not be running. Try `/daemon camera start`.
update.list_service_unreachable: ⚠️ Could not list versions because the update service is unreachable.
update.no_versions: ℹ️ No versions have been published yet.
update.alpha_list_truncated:
📚 *Alpha — choose a version*
_Installed: {0}_

_Showing the newest {1} of {2}. Older builds remain available on GitHub Releases._
_Downgrades are allowed._
update.channel_usage: Usage: `/update channel alpha` or `/update channel braveheart`
update.channel_service_unreachable: ⚠️ Could not switch the update channel because the update service is unreachable.
update.channel_switch_failed: ⚠️ Could not switch the update channel: {0}
update.channel_set_braveheart:
✅ Update channel set to *Braveheart (latest only)*.
Send /update to continue.
update.channel_set_alpha:
✅ Update channel set to *Alpha (all versions)*.
Send /update to continue.
update.installing:
⏳ *Installing update…*

The daemons will stop, the APK will be installed, and the device will restart. This bot will be silent for about 2 minutes. A new tunnel URL message will arrive when it is back online.
update.install_service_unreachable: ⚠️ Could not start the installation because the camera daemon is unreachable.
update.installed_new_tunnel:
🔄 *Overdrive updated to {0}*
New tunnel URL:
{1}

_The cloudflared link rotates after every install._

backup.restore_unavailable:
ℹ️ *Restore is not available through Telegram.*

Open Overdrive on the head unit or in the app, then go to *Settings → Backup & Restore* and select the backup file. Backups can only be restored on the same device and require confirmation there.
backup.building_with_trips: 💾 Building backup with settings and trip history…
backup.service_unreachable:
⚠️ Could not reach the backup service.

The camera daemon may not be running. Try `/daemon camera start`.
backup.write_failed: ⚠️ Could not write the backup file: {0}
backup.document_settings:
💾 Overdrive settings backup

⚠️ This file contains credentials and the device key. Keep it private. Restore it on this same head unit from Settings → Backup & Restore.
backup.document_settings_version:
💾 Overdrive settings backup · {0}

⚠️ This file contains credentials and the device key. Keep it private. Restore it on this same head unit from Settings → Backup & Restore.
backup.document_with_trips:
💾 Overdrive backup (settings + trip history: {0})

⚠️ This file contains credentials, the device key, and location history. Keep it private. Restore it on this same head unit from Settings → Backup & Restore.
backup.document_with_trips_version:
💾 Overdrive backup (settings + trip history: {0}) · {1}

⚠️ This file contains credentials, the device key, and location history. Keep it private. Restore it on this same head unit from Settings → Backup & Restore.
backup.upload_failed: ⚠️ Could not upload the backup file to Telegram.

sendlog.choose:

Choose a daemon or use `/sendlog <name>`:
sendlog.service_unreachable: ⚠️ Could not reach the log service. The camera daemon may not be running. Try `/daemon camera start`.

greeting.online:
🤖 *Surveillance Bot Online*

Bot daemon started and ready.
Use /help for available commands.

pair.no_owner: ⚠️ No owner paired. Use /pair <PIN> to pair.
pair.invalid_format: ❌ Invalid PIN format. Enter the 6-digit PIN from the app.
pair.no_pin: ❌ No PIN generated. Generate a PIN from the app first.
pair.expired: ❌ PIN expired. Generate a new PIN from the app.
pair.invalid: ❌ Invalid PIN. Check the PIN shown in the app.
pair.storage_error: ⚠️ Pairing could not be saved (storage error). Please try /pair again; if it keeps failing, restart the app.
pair.success:
✅ Paired successfully!

Welcome, {0}!
Use /help to see available commands.
pair.success_no_name:
✅ Paired successfully!

Use /help to see available commands.

motion.cleared_no_event: ✅ Motion cleared — no event recorded (filtered as a non-actor false alert).

📹 *Clip too large to send*
`{0}` ({1} MB)
View it on the device — it exceeds the 50 MB Telegram limit.
media.document_too_large:
📄 *File too large to send*
`{0}` ({1} MB) — it exceeds the 50 MB Telegram limit.

vehicle_control.cloud_required: Connect a BYD account in Settings to use this control
vehicle_control.local_unavailable_used_cloud: Direct connection unavailable — sent via cloud
vehicle_control.cloud_failed: Couldn't reach the car — try again when the vehicle is awake
vehicle_control.rate_limited: A command is still in progress — wait a few seconds
vehicle_control.not_supported: This control isn't available right now

automation.find_car_description: Flash lights and sound the horn to locate the vehicle.
automation.windows_all_description: Open, close, or stop all windows.
automation.tailgate_description: Open, close, or stop the tailgate/trunk.
automation.save_seat_position_description: Store the current driver-seat position into a memory slot.
automation.child_lock_description: Enable or disable the rear-door child lock.
automation.wireless_charging_description: Turn the phone wireless charger on or off.
automation.set_slw_description: The Speed Limit Warning state. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_esp_description: The Electronic Stability Control (ESP) state. Warning: turning ESP off disables stability control. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off, and the vehicle may re-enable ESP at the next start.
automation.set_itac_description: The iTAC (Intelligent Torque Adaption Control) traction feature. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_mirror_fold_description: Fold or unfold the exterior rear-view mirrors. Does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_cpd_description: The Child Presence Detection state. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_sunshade_description: Sunshade control. Stop will cause the sunshade to stop opening/closing and stay at the current position. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_sunroof_description: Sunroof control. Stop will cause the sunroof to stop opening/closing and stay at the current position. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off. Be careful when using this as an automation as it will still open when raining.
automation.set_drl_description: Set the Daytime Running Lights state. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_hazard_description: Turn the hazard (double-flash) warning lights on or off. Support varies by model — if the car ignores it, this action has no effect.
automation.media_control_description: Control the current media (play/pause, next, previous) — affects whatever is playing (radio, Bluetooth, or an app).
automation.volume_step_description: Nudge a channel's volume up or down by one step.
automation.set_ambient_brightness_description: Set the interior ambient light brightness (0-100%).
automation.sun_phase_description: Whether it is currently day or night at the vehicle's location (from GPS + local sunrise/sunset). Needs a location fix.
automation.drive_mode_condition_description: The current drive mode (Normal / ECO / Sport / Snow). On some models only ECO and Sport are reported.
automation.powertrain_mode_condition_description: The current powertrain mode (EV / HEV). Only reported on plug-in hybrid models.
automation.lock_condition_description: Whether the car is locked or unlocked. Read from the vehicle (with cloud fallback); most reliable while parked.
automation.energy_regen_condition_description: The energy-recuperation (regenerative braking) strength: Standard, High, or Max.
automation.send_notification_description: Send push notification. This will send a push notification to installed apps with notifications enabled.
automation.actions_description: What actions to run when this automation is triggered. These actions will run in order and can be slightly delayed.
automation.else_actions_description: Optional actions to run instead when the automation is triggered but its conditions are NOT met.
automation.power_description: The current power state of the vehicle. ACC state is when only the vehicle accessories are powered on.
automation.triggers_description: What events to watch for when triggering this Automation. When any of these values change, this automation will be checked against the conditions. Tip: add every signal you're waiting on as a trigger — e.g. to fire on a right turn at low speed, add both Right Indicator and Speed as triggers, then gate the exact values in the conditions below.
automation.conditions_description: What conditions to check when this automation is triggered. If the conditions no longer match when starting the actions, the automation will be cancelled. The conditions do not need to match the triggers.
automation.delay_description: How long to delay in seconds before triggering the actions. If the conditions change before the delay has complete, the actions will not trigger.
automation.window_open_percent_description: The percentage that the windows are open. 0 means they are closed and 100 means they are fully open.
automation.window_state_description: The current window state. It will be closed if they are closed and open if not. The All state will be open if any of the windows are open.
automation.battery_level_description: The current battery percentage. This tracks the EV battery percentage so does not include fuel for HEVs.
automation.estimated_range_description: The current estimated range in km. This tracks the EV range so does not include additional range provided with fuel for HEVs.
automation.lights_description: The current state of the lights.
automation.slw_description: The current state of the Speed Limit Warning setting.
automation.cpd_description: The current state of the Child Presence Detection setting.
automation.seat_climate_description: The current state of the Seat Climate settings.
automation.ac_description: Whether the Air Conditioning is on or off. The vehicle is required to be powered on for this to be on.
automation.temperature_description: The current temperature in Celsius — the cabin sensor while the car is on, otherwise the outside temperature or local weather.
automation.outside_temperature_description: The outside/ambient temperature in Celsius — the exterior sensor, falling back to local weather. Unlike Temperature, this never uses the cabin sensor.
automation.set_ac_description: Turn on or off the Air Conditioning. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_ac_temp_description: Change the current temperature for the Air Conditioning. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_ac_fan_description: Change the current fan speed for the Air Conditioning. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_ac_auto_description: Turn the climate control's automatic mode on or off. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_fan_only_description: Turn fan-only ventilation (no compressor) on or off. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_steering_heat_description: Turn the heated steering wheel on or off. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_recirculation_description: Switch the air intake between recirculating cabin air and drawing in fresh outside air.
automation.set_welcome_light_description: Turn the approach/welcome lighting on or off.
automation.set_reading_light_description: Turn the interior cabin (reading) light on or off.
automation.set_ambient_music_description: Turn the ambient-light music mode (lights pulse to audio) on or off.
automation.set_seat_position_description: Load a seat memory position. Ensure the memory has been saved first from the vehicle. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.open_windows_description: Open windows to a specific percentage. The position may be off by up to 5%. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.window_preset_description: Move a window to a preset position (Closed, Vent, Half, Full). The position may be off by up to 5%. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_surveillance_description: Turn on or off Surveillance. If the vehicle is currently powered on, it will take effect when it next powers off.
automation.set_recording_description: Control the recording mode. See the recording settings for descriptions of these modes.
automation.save_replay_description: Save a dashcam instant replay from the encoded camera history. Fires only while a recording mode is active (camera running); the two values are the seconds before and after the trigger and together must be 1–60 seconds.
automation.set_drive_mode_description: Switch the drive mode (Normal / ECO / Sport).
automation.set_powertrain_mode_description: Switch between EV and HEV (hybrid) on DM/PHEV vehicles.
automation.hold_battery_description: Switch to HEV so the engine drives the car without recharging the battery above its current level — holds the charge and saves fuel. (PHEV only; there is no separate target-SOC setting on this vehicle.)
automation.run_shell_description: Run a shell command in the daemon when this automation fires. Autonomous — requires the separate automation-shell permission (off by default).
automation.pause_description: Wait a fixed number of milliseconds before the next action runs.
automation.wait_until_description: Pause the remaining actions until a chosen signal meets a comparison, or the timeout elapses. Example: wait until Speed = 0 before closing the windows.
automation.wait_until_state_description: Pause the remaining actions until a chosen on/off signal reaches a state, or the timeout elapses. Example: wait until Indicators = Off before continuing.
automation.open_app_description: Launch an installed app when this automation fires.
automation.open_app_split_description: Launch an installed app docked to one half of the screen (split-screen) when this automation fires.
automation.show_camera_view_description: Show a camera view (front/rear/left/right/all) on the head unit or driver cluster at the chosen position. Shares the blind-spot display; blind-spot takes priority while active.
automation.shell_warning: Runs unattended as the daemon whenever this automation fires. A bad command can disrupt the head unit. Requires the automation-shell permission.
automation.set_ambient_description: Change the colour of the internal ambient lighting. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_media_volume_description: Set the media (music) volume as a percentage from 0 to 100.
automation.set_channel_volume_description: Set the volume on a chosen audio channel (media, navigation, voice, phone, …) as a percentage from 0 to 100.
automation.set_screen_brightness_description: Set the infotainment screen brightness as a percentage from 0 to 100. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_cluster_brightness_description: Set the driver instrument-cluster brightness as a percentage from 0 to 100. This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_hud_brightness_description: Set the head-up display brightness as a percentage from 0 to 100 (0 dims it out — there is no separate HUD on/off). This control does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_hud_power_description: Turn the head-up display on or off. This platform has no dedicated HUD switch, so Off dims the HUD out (brightness 0) and On restores full brightness. Does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_screen_power_description: Turn the centre infotainment screen on or off. The screen goes fully dark while the system stays awake, so recording and background features keep running. Turning it back on restores the display.
automation.set_lane_assist_description: Set the lane-assist mode: Off, Lane Departure Warning (alerts only), Lane Departure Prevention (steers you back), or both. Does not work while the vehicle is powered off.
automation.set_brake_feel_description: Set the brake-pedal feel (Comfort or Sport/Strong).
automation.play_audio_description: Play one of your uploaded sounds (MP3/WAV) through the head-unit speakers on a chosen channel. Upload sounds in the Audio Library on the Automations page.
automation.play_video_description: Play one of your uploaded videos (MP4) with its picture shown on the head-unit screen and audio on the chosen channel. Upload videos in the Audio Library on the Automations page.
automation.stop_audio_description: Stop any audio or video started by a Play Audio or Play Video action.
automation.speed_description: Current Vehicle Speed in the chosen units.
automation.accelerator_description: How far the accelerator pedal is pressed, as a percentage from 0 to 100.
automation.brake_description: How far the brake pedal is pressed, as a percentage from 0 to 100.
automation.steering_angle_description: The steering-wheel angle in degrees. Negative is left, positive is right; 0 is centred.
automation.turn_signal_description: Whether a turn indicator is on. Choose the side (left or right); the blinking is smoothed so a signalling indicator reads as steadily on.
automation.time_description: The local time of your vehicle. Comparisons will consider midnight to be the smallest time and 23:59 to be the largest.
automation.wifi_state_description: Whether the head unit is connected to WiFi.
automation.wifi_ssid_description: The name (SSID) of the connected WiFi network. Empty when not connected to WiFi.
automation.bt_state_description: Whether the head unit has a Bluetooth device (phone) connected.
automation.bt_device_name_description: The name of the connected Bluetooth device. Empty when nothing is connected.
automation.location_zone_description: The name of the location zone the car is currently in (as set up in Safe Locations), or "none" when outside every zone. Fires when the car enters or leaves a zone. Define zones — map-picked, radius down to 15m — on the Surveillance page.
automation.emergency_alarm_description: Fires when the vehicle's emergency alarm activates. This is the closest signal available to an incident/accident alert — the vehicle exposes no dedicated collision or airbag event.
automation.tyre_pressure_warn_description: The worst tyre-pressure state across all four wheels: normal, under-pressure, or over-pressure. Fires when any wheel's pressure warning changes.
automation.tyre_leak_warn_description: The worst tyre air-leak state across all four wheels: normal, slow leak, or fast leak. Fires when any wheel's leak warning changes.
automation.surveillance_armed_description: Fires when the parked-guard surveillance arms or disarms. Gate a rule on the car being watched (e.g. only while armed).
automation.surveillance_threat_description: The threat level of the most recent recorded sentry event: notice, alert, or critical. Fires once per event as the clip is saved.
automation.surveillance_object_description: The main object seen in the most recent sentry event: person, vehicle, bike, animal, or none.
automation.charging_state_description: Fires when the car starts or stops charging (the fused charging state, matching what the app shows).
automation.charge_gun_description: Fires when the charge cable is plugged in or unplugged. Note a plugged-in car may not be charging yet (e.g. scheduled charging).
automation.battery_soh_description: The high-voltage battery's state of health, as a percentage.
automation.key_battery_description: The smart-key fob battery state — fires when it reports low or normal.
automation.aux_12v_battery_description: The auxiliary 12V battery state — fires when it reports low or normal.
automation.fuel_level_description: The fuel tank level as a percentage (PHEV only).
automation.pm25_description: Cabin or outside PM2.5 fine-particulate level in µg/m³. Pick inside or outside.
automation.slope_description: The road incline in degrees (negative = downhill, positive = uphill).
automation.radar_nearest_description: The distance to the closest obstacle any parking-radar sensor sees, in centimetres. Only active at low speed while the radar is on.
automation.seatbelt_description: Fires when a seatbelt is buckled or unbuckled. Pick the driver or front-passenger seat.
automation.auto_wiper_description: Fires when the rain-sensing auto-wipers turn on or off. This is the closest 'it's raining' signal the car exposes — there is no dedicated rain sensor.
automation.wiper_active_description: Fires when the windscreen wipers start or stop (any speed).
automation.auto_lights_description: Fires when the light-sensor auto-headlights turn on or off — the closest 'it's dark' signal the car exposes.
automation.occupant_description: Fires when a seat becomes occupied or empty. Pick the driver or front-passenger seat.
automation.boot_description: Fires once shortly after the head unit boots up.
automation.set_variable_description: Set a named variable (a flag) to a value. Use it as a marker to coordinate automations — e.g. set a flag at the start of a routine and check it in the condition so the routine won't run again while it is still going, or share a mode between automations.
automation.variable_description: Matches a named variable you set with the Set Variable action. Compare it to a value (equals / not equals) — e.g. Parking_Mode not equal to true. An unset variable reads as empty, so "not equal to true" is true until you set it.
automation.door_state_description: Fires when a door, the bonnet, the boot or the fuel cap opens or closes. Pick which one (or Any), and whether it opened or closed.
automation.set_bsd_description: Turn Blind Spot Detection on or off. Verify support on your model.
automation.set_tsr_description: Turn Traffic Sign Recognition on or off.
automation.set_rcta_description: Turn the Rear Cross Traffic Alert warning on or off.
automation.set_fcta_description: Turn the Front Cross Traffic Alert warning on or off.
automation.set_tla_description: Turn the Traffic Light Attention reminder on or off.
automation.set_dow_description: Turn the Door Open Warning on or off.
automation.set_rcw_description: Turn the Rear Collision Warning on or off.
automation.set_islc_description: Turn Intelligent Speed Limit Control on or off.
automation.set_elka_description: SAFETY: Emergency Lane Keeping steers the car back into lane in an emergency. Turning it OFF removes that intervention.
automation.set_rctb_description: SAFETY: automatically brakes for rear cross traffic. Turning it OFF reduces protection.
automation.set_fctb_description: SAFETY: automatically brakes for front cross traffic. Turning it OFF reduces protection.
automation.set_fcw_description: SAFETY: set Forward Collision Warning sensitivity. A lower level warns later.
automation.set_aeb_description: SAFETY-CRITICAL: re-enable Automatic Emergency Braking. For safety this action can only turn AEB ON, never off.
automation.rain_probability_description: Forecast chance of rain (%) over the next few hours, from local weather by GPS. Needs a location fix and network.
automation.speak_description: Speak a spoken message aloud (text-to-speech), e.g. "Charging complete".
automation.show_toast_description: Show a brief on-screen message that floats over the current app and fades on its own. Does not interrupt what's playing or take over the screen.
automation.show_dialog_description: Show an on-screen dialog with a title, message, and an OK button. Floats over the current app without taking focus; closes when the user taps OK (or after the optional timeout).
automation.ui_nav_description: Press a system navigation button (Home, Back, or Recent apps).
automation.screenshot_description: Capture a screenshot of the chosen display to storage.
automation.move_app_display_description: Move an app to the head-unit or driver-cluster display.
automation.stop_cluster_cast_description: Stop casting an app to the driver cluster and restore the gauges.
automation.call_state_description: The phone call state: ringing (incoming/outgoing), active, or idle. Requires phone permission.
automation.increment_variable_description: Add a number (or subtract, using a negative amount) to a numeric variable — e.g. a counter.
automation.loop_description: Repeat the nested actions a number of times, or while/until a signal condition holds.
automation.if_description: Run the nested 'then' actions when a condition holds, otherwise the 'else' actions.
automation.action_group_run_description: Run a saved reusable action group by name.
automation.control_automation_description: Enable, disable, or toggle another automation — arm or disarm a routine from a rule.
automation.radio_description: Turn a device radio on or off. Turning WiFi off also stops the keep-alive from re-enabling it until you turn it back on.
automation.mqtt_publish_description: Publish a message to your MQTT broker (e.g. to notify Home Assistant). Sent to every configured connection. The topic and payload may include ${variable} placeholders.
automation.mqtt_trigger_description: Fires when your MQTT broker publishes to <base>/automation/<channel> (e.g. from Home Assistant). Enter the channel name and match its value.

messages.quality_storage_settings_updated_cleanup: Storage settings updated. Oldest files will be deleted to meet new limit.
messages.quality_h265_note: H.265 provides ~50% smaller files. Restart recording to apply codec change.
messages.update_installing_finishing: Installing — head unit will be back online shortly.
